reviews.comment:
Las habitaciones para pasar la noche  siendo socia son carismas.Un lugar tan grande en plena temporada deja de atender temprano y con pocos empleados.Aclaro,es un lugar importante de paso para cargar nafta!!

(Translated by Google)
The rooms for spending the night as a member are charming. Such a large place closes early in the middle of the season and has few employees. Let me clarify, it's a major transit point for filling up with gas!
